models.name: GPT-2
models.brainrotOneliner: 117M parameters. predicted the next token before it was cool. the ancestor that started everything.

models.name: GPT-3
models.brainrotTitle: the scaling hypothesis in human form
models.brainrotOneliner: 175B parameters. same recipe as GPT-2, just turned every dial to maximum. the original scale-pilled moment.

models.name: LLaMA 2
models.brainrotOneliner: 70B parameters, actually open, grouped-query attention. meta handed the community a main character and said go crazy.

models.name: GPT-4
models.brainrotOneliner: architecture details undisclosed. probably MoE. passed the bar exam. currently employed at every startup.

models.name: Claude 3
models.brainrotTitle: the one that actually reads the instructions
models.brainrotOneliner: constitutional AI, 200k context, and it will refuse to help you do crimes with more eloquence than any other model.

models.name: LLaMA 3 Instruct
models.brainrotOneliner: 405B parameters, actually open weights, benchmarks competitive with GPT-4. meta said hold my beer and then did it.

models.name: DeepSeek V3
models.brainrotOneliner: 671B parameters but only 37B doing actual werk at any time. efficiency arc unlocked.

models.name: Mixtral 8x7B
models.brainrotOneliner: 8 experts, 2 active at a time. 46B parameters but feels like 13B at inference. the MoE concept proof that changed everything.

models.name: Grok-1
models.brainrotOneliner: 314B parameters, 8 experts, 2 active, actually open-source. elon dropped the weights and walked away.
